front: Gostaria de falar sobre a minha experiência profissional.
pronunciation: goos-tah-REE-ah jee fah-LAHR SOH-bree ah MEENG-yah eyks-peh-ree-EHN-syah proo-fees-yo-NAW.
back: I would like to talk about my professional experience.
context: An interview opener introducing one's employment history using 'experiência profissional'.

front: Eu tenho cinco anos de experiência em educação infantil.
pronunciation: ew TEYNG-yoo SEENG-koo AH-noos jee eyks-peh-ree-EHN-syah ahyng ee-doo-kah-SOHNG een-fahn-TEEW.
back: I have five years of experience in early childhood education.
context: Stating industry seniority using the specific field term 'educação infantil'.

front: Eu possuo um diploma técnico em administração.
pronunciation: ew poo-SOO-oo oong jee-PLOH-mah TEHK-nee-koo ahyng ad-mee-nees-trah-SOHNG.
back: I hold a technical certificate/diploma in administration.
context: Using the verb 'possuir' (to possess/hold) to state formal qualifications.

front: Por que você está interessado nesta vaga?
pronunciation: poor KEE voh-SEH ees-TAH een-teh-reh-SAH-doo NEHS-tah VAH-gah?
back: Why are you interested in this position/vacancy?
context: A classic recruiter screening query using the noun 'vaga' (job opening).

front: Estou buscando uma transição de carreira para a tecnologia.
pronunciation: ees-TOY boos-KAHN-doo OO-mah trahn-zee-SOHNG jee kah-RAY-rah PAH-rah ah tehk-noo-loo-ZHEE-ah.
back: I am seeking a career transition into technology.
context: Explaining professional pivots using the phrase 'transição de carreira'.

front: Quais são as suas principais qualidades e defeitos?
pronunciation: kways SOHNG ahs SOO-ahs preeng-see-PAYS kwah-lee-DAH-jees ee jee-FAY-toos?
back: What are your main strengths and weaknesses?
context: Standard interview evaluation query. In Brazilian Portuguese, strengths/weaknesses are often framed as 'qualidades e defeitos'.

front: Eu sei trabalhar sob pressão e cumprir prazos rígidos.
pronunciation: ew say trah-bah-LYAHR sohb preh-SOHNG ee koom-PREER PRAH-zoos HEE-zhee-doos.
back: I know how to work under pressure and meet strict deadlines.
context: Highlighting soft skills using 'sob pressão' and 'cumprir prazos'.

front: Fale um pouco sobre a sua formação acadêmica.
pronunciation: FAH-lee oong POH-koo SOH-bree ah SOO-ah fohr-mah-SOHNG ah-kah-DEH-mee-kah.
back: Tell us a bit about your educational background.
context: Inviting a candidate to detail degrees or certificates using 'formação acadêmica'.

front: Eu me formei recentemente em um curso intensivo de programação.
pronunciation: ew mee fohr-MAY heh-seeyng-chee-MEHN-chee ahyng oong KOOR-soo eeyn-tehn-SEE-voo jee proo-grah-mah-SOHNG.
back: I recently graduated from an intensive coding bootcamp/course.
context: Using 'me formei' followed by 'em' to indicate recent course graduation.

front: Quais são as suas expectativas salariais?
pronunciation: kways SOHNG ahs SOO-ahs eyks-pehk-tah-VEE-vahs sah-lah-ree-AYS?
back: What are your salary expectations?
context: Inquiring about compensation baselines using 'expectativas salariais'.

front: Eu gosto de resolver problemas lógicos complexos.
pronunciation: ew GOHS-too jee heh-zowl-VEHR proo-BLEH-mahs LOH-zhee-koos kohm-PLEHKS-oos.
back: I like to solve complex logical problems.
context: Expressing an affinity for analytical tasks or software logic building.

front: Como você lida com conflitos na equipe?
pronunciation: KOH-moo voh-SEH LEE-dah koong kohn-FLEE-toos nah ee-KEE-pee?
back: How do you deal with conflicts in the team?
context: Evaluating conflict resolution skills using the idiomatic verb 'lidar com'.

front: Onde você se vê daqui a cinco anos?
pronunciation: OHN-jee voh-SEH mee veh dah-KEE ah SEENG-koo AH-noos?
back: Where do you see yourself five years from now?
context: A classic long-term vision question using the temporal construction 'daqui a'.

front: Eu falo português fluentemente e uso o inglês para o trabalho.
pronunciation: ew FAH-loo poor-too-GHEHS floo-ehyn-chee-MEHN-chee ee OO-zoo oo eeyng-GLEHS PAH-rah oo trah-BAH-lyoo.
back: I speak Portuguese fluently and use English for work.
context: Describing professional language proficiency layout.

front: Quais benefícios a empresa oferece além do salário?
pronunciation: kways beh-neh-FEE-syoos ah eeym-PREH-zah oh-feh-REH-see ah-LAYM doo sah-LAH-ryoo?
back: What benefits does the company offer besides the salary?
context: Inquiring about total compensation perks (e.g., meal vouchers, health insurance).

front: Eu me considero uma pessoa muito organizada e proativa.
pronunciation: ew mee kohn-see-DEH-roo OO-mah peh-SOH-ah MOOI-too oohr-gah-nee-ZAH-dah ee proo-ah-CHEE-vah.
back: I consider myself a very organized and proactive person.
context: Describing positive work ethic attributes; 'proativa' matches a female speaker or generic 'pessoa'.

front: Esta vaga é para contratação imediata?
pronunciation: EHS-tah VAH-gah eh PAH-rah kohn-trah-tah-SOHNG ee-mee-JYAH-tah?
back: Is this position for immediate hiring?
context: Checking onboarding timelines using 'contratação imediata'.

front: Eu tenho facilidade para aprender novas tecnologias.
pronunciation: ew TEYNG-yoo fah-see-lee-DAH-jee PAH-rah ah-prehn-DEHR NOH-vahs tehk-noo-loo-ZHEE-ahs.
back: I have an easy time learning new technologies.
context: Stating technical adaptability using the phrase 'ter facilidade para'.

front: Como funciona o processo de seleção da empresa?
pronunciation: KOH-moo foon-syo-NAH oo proo-SEHS-oo jee seh-leh-SOHNG dah eeym-PREH-zah?
back: How does the company's selection process work?
context: Inquiring about multi-stage vetting setups using 'processo de seleção'.

front: Eu já participei de uma fase intensa de testes técnicos.
pronunciation: ew zhah pahr-chee-see-PAY jee OO-mah FAH-zee eeyn-TEHN-sah jee TEHS-chees TEHK-nee-koos.
back: I have already participated in an intense phase of technical tests.
context: Referencing grueling coding assessments or practical screening challenges.

front: Você prefere trabalhar de forma autônoma ou em equipe?
pronunciation: voh-SEH preh-FEH-ree trah-bah-LYAHR jee FOHR-mah ow-TOH-noo-mah ow ahyng ee-KEE-pee?
back: Do you prefer to work autonomously or in a team?
context: Evaluating structural workflow style alignment preferences.

front: O regime de contratação é CLT ou PJ?
pronunciation: oo heh-ZHEE-mee jee kohn-trah-tah-SOHNG eh C-L-T ow P-J?
back: Is the employment contract model CLT or PJ?
context: Crucial Brazilian labor context: CLT refers to traditional employment with full legal rights; PJ refers to independent contractor/corporate entity structures.

front: Gostaria de saber mais sobre a cultura interna.
pronunciation: goos-tah-REE-ah jee sah-BEHR mays SOH-bree ah kool-TOO-rah eeyn-TEHR-nah.
back: I would like to know more about the internal culture.
context: Showing candidate interest in corporate lifestyle dynamics.

front: Eu desenvolvi um projeto pessoal usando Vue.js.
pronunciation: ew jeh-zehn-vow-VEE oong proo-ZHEH-too pehs-oo-AW oo-ZAHN-doo Vue.js.
back: I developed a personal project using Vue.js.
context: Showcasing portfolio pieces using specific past actions ('desenvolvi').

front: Quando vocês pretendem divulgar o resultado final?
pronunciation: KWAHN-doo voh-SEHS prah-TEHN-deeyng jee-vool-GAHR oo heh-zool-TAH-doo fee-NAW?
back: When do you plan to announce the final result?
context: The verb 'pretender' means 'to plan/intend' (not to pretend). Checking next-step communication timelines.

front: Eu me considero pronto para assumir novos desafios.
pronunciation: ew mee kohn-see-DEH-roo PROHN-too PAH-rah ah-soo-MEER NOH-vahs jeh-zah-FEE-oos.
back: I consider myself ready to take on new challenges.
context: Expressing professional readiness. Female speakers use 'pronta'.

front: Qual é a carga horária semanal dessa posição?
pronunciation: kwaw eh ah KAHR-gah oo-RAH-ryah seh-mah-NAW DEHS-ah poo-zee-SOHNG?
back: What is the weekly hourly workload of this position?
context: Inquiring about time commitments using the specific noun phrase 'carga horária'.

front: Nós entraremos em contato por telefone ou e-mail.
pronunciation: nohs eeym-trah-REH-moos ahyng kohn-TAH-too poor teh-leh-FOH-nee ow e-mail.
back: We will get in touch by phone or email.
context: Standard HR follow-up assurance phrase using future indicator 'entraremos em contato'.

front: Eu tenho flexibilidade de horários para trabalhar.
pronunciation: ew TEYNG-yoo flehk-see-bee-lee-DAH-jee jee oo-RAH-ryoos PAH-rah trah-bah-LYAHR.
back: I have scheduling flexibility to work.
context: Stating availability parameters using 'flexibilidade de horários'.

front: Você tem alguma dúvida sobre a nossa empresa?
pronunciation: voh-SEH cheyng aw-GOONG-mah DOO-vee-dah SOH-bree ah NOH-sah eeym-PREH-zah?
back: Do you have any questions about our company?
context: Closing interview loop inviting candidate feedback queries.

front: Eu gostaria de agradecer pela oportunidade da entrevista.
pronunciation: ew goos-tah-REE-ah jee ah-grah-deh-SEHR PEH-lah oh-poor-too-nee-DAH-jee dah eeyn-treh-VEES-tah.
back: I would like to thank you for the interview opportunity.
context: A courteous closing sign-off statement for candidates.

front: O plano de carreira deles parece ser muito sólido.
pronunciation: oo PLAH-nooo jee kah-RAY-rah DEH-lees pah-REH-see sayr MOOI-too SOH-lee-doo.
back: Their career plan seems to be very solid.
context: Evaluating organizational growth roadmaps using 'plano de carreira'.

front: Fiquei sabendo que passei para a próxima etapa.
pronunciation: fee-KAY sah-BEHN-doo kee pah-SAY PAH-rah ah PROH-see-mah eh-TAH-pah.
back: I found out that I moved on to the next stage.
context: Using conversational idiom 'fiquei sabendo' (I found out / was informed) regarding progress updates.

front: Vou atualizar o meu currículo hoje à noite.
pronunciation: vow ah-too-ah-lee-ZAHR oo mew koo-HEE-koo OH-zhee ah NOY-chee.
back: I will update my resume tonight.
context: Using 'currículo' to refer to a professional CV/resume document.

front: Muito obrigado pelo seu tempo e atenção hoje.
pronunciation: MOOI-too oo-bree-GAH-doo PEH-loo seu TEHMP-oo ee ah-tehn-SOHNG OH-zhee.
back: Thank you very much for your time and attention today.
context: A warm, respectful checkout courtesy phrase. Use 'obrigada' if female.
